evals.prompt: A newly inherited repo has committed environment files, stale plans, no CI, and unclear protected docs. Run Wave 0.
evals.expected_output: Scores the repo, blocks unsafe cleanup around secrets and protected docs, and opens issues or gates before sprint planning.
assertions: Secrets concerns become a blocker or gate.
Ambiguous protected docs are not deleted automatically.
CI and source-of-truth gaps are recorded.

evals.prompt: A repo has generated temp files, obsolete local caches, and a duplicated private task list that conflicts with GitHub Issues.
evals.expected_output: Applies or proposes only mechanical cleanup, records the backlog conflict, and defines REPO_HYGIENE_COMPLETE criteria.
assertions: Mechanical cleanup is separated from judgment calls.
A handoff is named after hygiene assessment.
